nameMeanings.name: Ruffus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Morayshire called Duffus.

English: nickname or topographic name from Middle English douvehous, duffous ‘dovecote’, for someone who lived by or worked in a dovehouse. It is possible that the English form of this name died out in or after the medieval period.
Possibly also an Americanized form of Dutch Duffhues or Duifhuis: topographic or habitational name referring to a house or a farm distinguished by a dovecot (compare 2 above) and named so.

nameMeanings.name: Eincina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: habitational name from any of various places called La Encina, from encina ‘holm oak’ (Old Spanish lecina, from Late Latin ilicina, a derivative of Latin ilex, genitive ilicis).

variants.name: Encinia
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico): altered form of Spanish   Encina  .

variants.name: Encinas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Jesus, Juan, Manuel, Mario, Francisco, Ramona, Ruben, Catalina, Ernesto, Fernando.
Spanish: habitational name from any of various places so named, for example in the provinces of Salamanca, Valladolid, and Segovia, from the plural of encina ‘holm oak’ (see Encina ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Eincina Ruffus was born in Grove, Nottinghamshire, England as the daughter of William Ruffus III and Isabel d'Arques. She married Eustace de Morteyn in 1213, in Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died after 1247, in Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Eincina Ruffus est née à Grove, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, fille de William Ruffus III et Isabel d'Arques. Elle a épousé Eustace de Morteyn en 1213, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée après 1247, à Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Eincina Ruffus wurde in Grove, Nottinghamshire, England, als Tochter von William Ruffus III und Isabel d'Arques geboren. Sie hat 1213 in Nottinghamshire, England Eustace de Morteyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1247 in Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Eincina Ruffus è nata il nel Grove, Nottinghamshire, England come figlia di William Ruffus III e Isabel d'Arques. Lei sposato Eustace de Morteyn nel 1213, nel Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì dopo il 1247, nel Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eincina RuffusはイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアグローブでWilliam Ruffus IIIとIsabel d'Arquesの娘として生まれた。1213年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでEustace de Morteynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1247年以後にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオラトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eincina Ruffus(은)는 영국 노틴그함실르 그로브에서 William Ruffus III(와)과 Isabel d'Arques의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1213년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 Eustace de Morteyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1247년 이후 영국 노틴그함실르 울라턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Eincina Ruffus nasceu em Grove, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra filha de William Ruffus III e Isabel d'Arques. Ela casou-se com Eustace de Morteyn em 1213, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1247, em Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Eincina Ruffus родилась в местности гров, ноттингхамшир, Англия. Её родителей звали William Ruffus III и Isabel d'Arques. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eustace de Morteyn в 1213 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла после 1247 г. в местности воллатон, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Eincina Ruffus nació en Grove, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra como hija de William Ruffus III y Isabel d'Arques. Se casó con Eustace de Morteyn en 1213, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió después de 1247, en Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
